title: Counter reducer RESET broken
prompt:
There is a bug in src/counterReducer.ts. The RESET action does NOT actually reset state — it returns state unchanged. The action should reset count to 0 and clear history to [].

Fix the RESET case so the failing tests in tests/target.test.ts pass. The tests in tests/regression.test.ts must continue to pass — INC/DEC/SET must keep working exactly as today.

Do not modify the tests. Do not add new files. Keep the change minimal — only the RESET case needs to change.
